Initial 6 nodes + 8 required_variables = 14 total nodes required by task specification

privileged_info_summary: This is a synthetic task for systems thinking/causal loop diagram design in draw.io. The task specifies adding 8 variables to an initial 6-variable diagram for total of 14 nodes representing urban traffic congestion dynamics. The 8 required new variables are: Attractiveness of Driving, Road Expansion Budget, Remote Work Adoption, Air Quality, Fuel Consumption, CO2 Emissions, Population Growth, and Housing Demand Near Transit. The diagram must include 5 required feedback loops (R1, R2, B1, B2, B3) with causal links labeled with polarity signs (+/-). The diagram file starts at /home/ga/Diagrams/traffic_congestion_cld.drawio with 6 initial nodes (Traffic Volume, Road Congestion, Travel Time, Road Capacity, Public Transit Ridership, Economic Activity) and 3 initial unlabeled edges.
